User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account in the Auralook.uz application, storing core profile information and communication details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's unique email address for account access. This is used for login and identification.

telegramUsername.description: The user's Telegram username for receiving automated notifications about order status and other updates.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was last updated.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores detailed profile information for a user, specifically used by the AI Smart Size Advisor to provide personalized clothing size recommendations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User associated with this profile. (Relationship: User 1:1 UserProfile)

heightCm.description: The user's height in centimeters, a key input for the AI Smart Size Advisor.

weightKg.description: The user's weight in kilograms, a key input for the AI Smart Size Advisor.

gender.description: The user's self-identified gender, used to tailor size recommendations (e.g., 'male', 'female', 'other').

desiredFit.description: The user's preferred clothing fit style (e.g., 'loose', 'regular', 'tight'), influencing size recommendations.

Look.title: Look
Look.description: Represents a curated outfit or 'look' displayed in the Auralook.uz multi-language lookbook, featuring images and localized descriptions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Look entity.

titleUz.description: The title of the look in Uzbek for localized display.

titleRu.description: The title of the look in Russian for localized display.

titleEn.description: The title of the look in English for localized display.

descriptionUz.description: A detailed, multi-language description of the look in Uzbek, potentially AI-generated.

descriptionRu.description: A detailed, multi-language description of the look in Russian, potentially AI-generated.

descriptionEn.description: A detailed, multi-language description of the look in English, potentially AI-generated.

mainImageUrl.description: URL for the high-resolution main image of the look.

thumbnailImageUrl.description: URL for a smaller thumbnail image of the look, optimized for UI display.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the look was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the look's details were last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's order, tracking its details and status for automated updates and notifications.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who placed this order. (Relationship: User 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: The date and time when the order was placed.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., 'New', 'Confirmed', 'Shipped', 'Delivered', 'Cancelled').

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order, including shipping and taxes.

shippingAddress.description: The complete shipping address provided by the customer for this order.

customerNotes.description: Any additional notes or specific instructions provided by the customer for this order.

telegramNotificationSent.description: Flag indicating whether a real-time Telegram notification regarding this order's status has been sent to the customer.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the order's status or details were last updated.

definition.description: Stores core user account information. Each document's ID is the user's authentication UID. Access is restricted to the owning user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

definition.description: Stores detailed profile information for a user, specific for the AI Smart Size Advisor. Each document's ID is the user's authentication UID, matching the 'userId' field within the document. Access is restricted to the owning user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user, which also serves as the document ID and the 'userId' field value.

definition.description: Contains curated outfit 'Looks' for the multi-language lookbook. Documents are publicly readable by all users (authenticated and unauthenticated). Write, update, and delete access is restricted to users with the 'look_creator' role.

params.name: lookId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific Look.

definition.description: Manages customer order details. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence. Accessible by the owning user (identified by 'userId' field) and by users with the 'order_manager' role for tracking and updates.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific customer order.

definition.description: Database-backed access control collection for 'order manager' roles. An existing document at this path grants the corresponding userId permission to manage orders.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of a user designated as an order manager.

definition.description: Database-backed access control collection for 'look creator' roles. An existing document at this path grants the corresponding userId permission to create, update, and delete looks.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of a user designated as a look creator.

firestore.reasoning:
The Auralook.uz Firestore structure is designed with a strong emphasis on Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and DBAC, while accounting for the removal of an explicit 'admin dashboard'.

**Authorization Independence:** This is primarily achieved through denormalization and careful path design. For user-specific private data such as `UserProfile` and `Order` information, instead of nesting them deeply under `users/{userId}` subcollections where security rules might rely on parent document reads (`get()`), they are placed in top-level collections (`/userProfiles/{userId}` and `/orders/{orderId}`). Each document in these collections explicitly contains the `userId` field. This `userId` field is used in security rules to directly verify ownership (`request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId`) without requiring a `get()` call to a parent user document. This enables atomic operations and simplifies security rule logic. For `Look` entities, access is global for reads, and write access is granted based on a global role collection, completely independent of other data entities.

**Structural Segregation & QAPs:**
*   **`/users/{userId}`:** This collection stores core `User` data. Access is strictly limited to the authenticated user (`request.auth.uid`). `list` operations are not applicable here, as users can only access their own specific user document.
*   **`/userProfiles/{userId}`:** This collection stores the `UserProfile` data, with each document's ID matching the `userId`. This ensures a 1:1 relationship and clear path-based ownership. Similar to `/users`, `list` operations are not applicable beyond retrieving one's own profile.
*   **`/looks/{lookId}`:** This collection stores publicly viewable `Look` data. Its security posture is 'publicly readable by all', thus directly supporting QAPs for `list` operations without requiring filters in rules. Write access is segregated to users holding the `look_creator` role, which is checked via an existence check in the `/roles_look_creators/{uid}` collection.
*   **`/orders/{orderId}`:** This collection stores all `Order` entities at the top level. Each `Order` document explicitly contains a `userId` field. This design supports QAPs for both regular users and 'order managers':
    *   **User View:** Users can efficiently `list` their own orders by querying `where('userId', '==', request.auth.uid)`. The security rules verify that `resource.data.userId == request.auth.uid` for any access, enabling a secure `list` operation without rules acting as filters.
    *   **Order Manager View:** Users designated as 'order managers' (via the `/roles_order_managers/{uid}` collection) are granted permission to `list` all orders. This allows them to track and update customer order statuses efficiently across all users without requiring a `get()` call per order or complex filtering in rules.

**DBAC (Database-Backed Access Control):** Global roles like `order_manager` and `look_creator` are managed through dedicated top-level collections (`/roles_order_managers/{userId}` and `/roles_look_creators/{userId}`). The existence of a document for a given `uid` in these collections grants the respective role, ensuring clear and auditable role management without relying on custom claims.

This structure provides a secure, scalable, and debuggable foundation for Auralook.uz, explicitly addressing the core design principles and the specific requirements, including the removal of the explicit 'admin dashboard' by abstracting admin functionalities into role-based permissions.
